EnteleKRON Ecosystem

Connected to the EnteleKRON architecture

EnteleWALLET Lite is the wallet access layer linking users to the EnteleKRON trust infrastructure, ENK utility, SOVRA intelligence, and modular TVK Group ecosystem components.

Architecture

Desc

EnteleKRON

Trust infrastructure platform organizing identity, verification, integrity, and interoperability across the TVK ecosystem.

ENK

Utility token powering governance, access, and network operations within the EnteleKRON ecosystem.

SOVRA

Intelligence layer coordinating modules, trust workflows, and future AI-assisted wallet guidance.

EnergieMIND

Energy infrastructure module connected to the broader TVK and EnteleKRON ecosystem architecture.

EnteleSCAN

Explorer and visibility layer for contracts, treasury wallets, and ecosystem address verification.

EnteleVAULT

Privacy and credential vault structure for secure records, credentials, and controlled access events.

EnteleCLOS

Connected ecosystem operations layer within the EnteleKRON modular architecture.

GraphVAULT

Structured data and verification graph infrastructure for ecosystem integrity workflows.

ChronoSEAL

Proof and timestamping events for verification, integrity, and audit-ready ecosystem records.

Q-Presence

Presence, liveness, and access proof capabilities for sensitive verification events.

Sentient Signals

Signal and intelligence pathways across ecosystem modules and trust workflows.

TVKWallet

Wallet infrastructure connected to TVK Group identity, access, and ecosystem services.

TVK ID

Digital identity and access gateway linking profiles, wallet verification, roles, and permissions.

TVK Group

Parent ecosystem organization connecting TVK Labs, EnteleKRON, SOVRA, and modular infrastructure ventures.

Lite role

Desc

Transparency EnteleKRON

EnteleWALLET

Secure Wallet Access Layer

EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds, store seed phrases or private keys.
